title: next-upgradeInput
description: Input schema for Structured workflow for upgrading Next.js applications across major versions. Use when migrating a Next.js project from one major version to another (e.g., 13 to 14, 14 to 15, 15 to 16). Covers codemod automation, breaking change detection, incremental migration paths, and post-upgrade validation.

target.description: Target file or path for the skill to operate on
